Class Photo

java.lang.Object
com.matsvei.photosapp.photo.Photo
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Photo extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a photo in the Photos application. Each photo has a file path, date, caption, and a collection of tags.
Author:
matsvei
